---
title: "Vidit_LDA_Exercise_WashU"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

## Data Cleaning

```{R}
# Libraries
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(kableExtra)
library(glmnet)
```

```{R}
# Reading the datasets
# Baseline Data
base = read_csv(here("files", "baseline_df.csv"))
# Visits Data
vis = read_csv(here("files", "visits_df.csv"))
# Exits and Death Data
outcome = read_csv(here("files", "outcomes_df.csv"))

# Summary check for all datasets
summary(base)
print("---")
summary(vis)
print("---")
summary(outcome)

# View all of them
view(base)
view(vis)
view(outcome)
```

```{R}
# Data Cleaning, Manipulation and Merging
# Ignoring NAs or missingnes for now
# First cleaning base
base = base |>
  mutate(sex = as.factor(sex))
summary(base$sex)
# So, sex = 1, M, male, Male means males and otherwise female
base_clean = base |>
  mutate(male = factor(
  ifelse(sex %in% c(1, "M", "male", "Male"), 1, 0),
  levels = c(0, 1)
)) |>
  dplyr::select(-sex) |>
  mutate(entry_date = as.Date(entry_date, format = "%d-%b-%Y")) |>
  mutate(id = as.character(id))
summary(base_clean)

# Now cleaning vis
vis = vis |>
  mutate(visit_type = as.factor(visit_type))
summary(vis$visit_type)

vis_clean = vis |>
  mutate(
    visit_type = factor(tolower(as.character(visit_type))),
    id = as.character(id),
    visit_date = as.Date(visit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(starts_with("sbp"), ~ ifelse(.x <= 40, NA, .x)),
    across(starts_with("dbp"), ~ ifelse(.x <= 30, NA, .x))
  )
summary(vis_clean)

# Now cleaning outcome 
outcome = outcome |>
  mutate(exit_type = as.factor(exit_type))
summary(outcome$exit_type)

outcome_clean = outcome |>
  mutate(id = as.character(id),
    exit_date = as.Date(exit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y"))

summary(outcome_clean)

# Joining the data!
full_data = base_clean |>
  left_join(vis_clean, by = "id") |>
  left_join(outcome_clean, by = "id")


full_data = full_data |>
  mutate(
    avg_sbp = rowMeans(cbind(sbp2, sbp3), na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_dbp = rowMeans(cbind(dbp2, dbp3), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

full_data = full_data |>
  mutate(
    a_med = as.factor(as.integer(
      if_any(
        c(amlodipine, bisoprolol, captopril, carvedilol,
          enalapril, furosemide, hctz, lisinopril,
          losaratan, metoprolol),
        ~ . == 1
      )
    ))
  )
summary(full_data)

write_csv(full_data, "files/full_data.csv")
```

```{R}
head(full_data, 20)
```

## Incident Hypertension

```{R}
# Helper function to prevent "no non-missing arguments" warnings
safe_min <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 0 || all(is.na(x))) return(as.Date(NA))
  min(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

# 1. Initial cleaning and baseline filtering
table_data = full_data |>
  arrange(id, visit_date) |>
  mutate(
    meds = a_med,
    htn = ifelse(!is.na(avg_sbp) & !is.na(avg_dbp),
                 as.integer(avg_sbp >= 130 | avg_dbp >= 80),
                 NA_integer_),
    htn_or_meds = as.integer(htn == 1 | meds == 1)
  ) |>
  group_by(id) |>
  mutate(visit_number = row_number()) |>
  ungroup()

# Keep only those who were disease-free at visit 1
baseline_df_ids = table_data |>
  filter(visit_number == 1, htn == 0, meds == 0) |>
  pull(id)

table_data = table_data |>
  filter(id %in% baseline_df_ids)

# 2. Calculate dates and Person-Years 
event_dates = table_data |>
  arrange(id, visit_date) |>
  group_by(id) |>
  summarise(
    entry_date = min(visit_date),
    last_date = max(visit_date),
    # Using safe_min to avoid warnings
    first_event_date = safe_min(visit_date[visit_number > 1 & htn_or_meds == 1]),
    second_event_date = safe_min(visit_date[visit_number > 1 & cumsum(htn_or_meds == 1) >= 2])
  ) |>
  mutate(
    # Person-years until first event or last follow-up (Censoring)
    py_A = as.numeric(pmin(first_event_date, last_date, na.rm = TRUE) - entry_date) / 365.25,
    # Person-years until second event or last follow-up
    py_B = as.numeric(pmin(second_event_date, last_date, na.rm = TRUE) - entry_date) / 365.25,
    # Event flags
    event_A = as.integer(!is.na(first_event_date)),
    event_B = as.integer(!is.na(second_event_date))
  )

# 3. Create the final person-level dataframe
person_df = table_data |>
  group_by(id) |>
  summarise(
    male = first(male),
    age = first(age)
  ) |>
  inner_join(event_dates, by = "id") |>
  mutate(
    age_group = case_when(
      age < 30 ~ "18-29 years",
      age < 40 ~ "30-39 years",
      age < 50 ~ "40-49 years",
      age < 60 ~ "50-59 years",
      TRUE ~ "60+ years"
    )
  )
```


```{R}
make_table_kable <- function(df, event_var) {
  
  # Which PY column to use?
  py_col <- ifelse(event_var == "event_A", "py_A", "py_B")
  
  table_rows <- list()
  
  # Total row
  n_total <- nrow(df)
  e_total <- sum(df[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  py_total <- sum(df[[py_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  inc_total <- ifelse(py_total > 0, (e_total / py_total) * 1000, NA)
  
  table_rows[[1]] <- data.frame(
    Category = "**Total**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = n_total,
    `Events (n)` = e_total,
    `Person-Years` = round(py_total, 2),
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_total, 2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Sex header row
  table_rows[[2]] <- data.frame(
    Category = "**Sex**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = "",
    `Events (n)` = "",
    `Person-Years` = "",
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Sex sub-rows
  for (sex in c(1,0)) {
    sub <- df[df$male == sex, ]
    py_sub <- sum(sub[[py_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    inc_sub <- ifelse(py_sub > 0, (sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / py_sub) * 1000, NA)
    table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
      Category = ifelse(sex == 1, "Male", "Female"),
      `Disease Free (n)` = nrow(sub),
      `Events (n)` = sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      `Person-Years` = round(py_sub, 2),
      `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_sub, 2),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Age group header row
  table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
    Category = "**Age group**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = "",
    `Events (n)` = "",
    `Person-Years` = "",
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Age group sub-rows
  groups <- c("18-29 years","30-39 years","40-49 years","50-59 years","60+ years")
  for (g in groups) {
    sub <- df[df$age_group == g, ]
    if (nrow(sub) > 0) {
      py_sub <- sum(sub[[py_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
      inc_sub <- ifelse(py_sub > 0, (sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / py_sub) * 1000, NA)
      table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
        Category = g,
        `Disease Free (n)` = nrow(sub),
        `Events (n)` = sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
        `Person-Years` = round(py_sub, 2),
        `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_sub, 2),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  }
  
  # Bind all rows
  out_table <- do.call(rbind, table_rows)
  
  # Column names
  colnames(out_table) <- c("Category","Disease Free (n)","Events (n)","Person-Years","Incidence per 1000 PYs")
  
  out_table %>%
    kbl(caption = paste0("Incident Hypertension - ", event_var),
        escape = FALSE,  # bold markdown works
        align = "lrrrr") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"))
}

# Part A table
make_table_kable(person_df, "event_A")

# Part B table
make_table_kable(person_df, "event_B")
```

## Regression

```{R}
# Create BMI
full_data_bmi = full_data |>
  dplyr::select(id, height, weight) |>
  mutate(height = height/100) |> # Converting height to meters
  mutate(bmi = weight/(height^2))

bmi_data = full_data_bmi |>
  dplyr::select(-c(height, weight))
```

```{R}
person_df = person_df |>
  left_join(bmi_data, by = 'id') |>
  mutate(age10 = age/10)
```

```{R}
person_df = person_df |>
  mutate(
    event_A = as.integer(event_A),
    py_A = as.numeric(py_A)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(event_A),
    !is.na(py_A),
    py_A > 0
  )

# Univariable models
model_age = glm(event_A ~ age10,
                offset = log(py_A),
                family = poisson(),
                data = person_df)

model_sex = glm(event_A ~ male,
                offset = log(py_A),
                family = poisson(),
                data = person_df)

model_bmi = glm(event_A ~ bmi,
                offset = log(py_A),
                family = poisson(),
                data = person_df)

# Multivariable model
model_multi = glm(event_A ~ age10 + male + bmi,
                  offset = log(py_A),
                  family = poisson(),
                  data = person_df)

# IRRs and CIs
exp(coef(model_age))
exp(confint(model_age))

exp(coef(model_sex))
exp(confint(model_sex))

exp(coef(model_bmi))
exp(confint(model_bmi))

exp(coef(model_multi))
exp(confint(model_multi))
```
